violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. A tube of raw ground beef and a package of raw ribs were stored on the same tray in the reach in cooler in the back room.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Pans of rice, cooked meats, and beans in the reach in cooler in the back room were not dated.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelf that holds the microwave has bare wood on the edges.
